nodes.name: Hispaniolan moist forests
nodes.summary: Hispaniolan moist forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Hispaniolan lizard cuckoo、Bay-breasted cuckoo、Hispaniolan nightjar等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Hispaniolan dry forests
nodes.summary: Hispaniolan dry forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Bay-breasted cuckoo、中美夜鹰、Hispaniolan nightjar等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Baoruco Mountain Range
nodes.summary: Baoruco Mountain Range是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括La Selle thrush、Hispaniolan crossbill、Grey-crowned palm-tanager等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grey-crowned palm-tanager
nodes.summary: Grey-crowned palm-tanager（Grey-crowned palm-tanager，学名 Phaenicophilus poliocephalus），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 夏尔·吕西安·波拿巴
nodes.summary: 夏尔·吕西安·波拿巴是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联32种鸟类，包括红头林䳍、非洲鸽、Horned coot等32种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The grey-crowned palm-tanager or grey-crowned tanager (Phaenicophilus poliocephalus) is a Near Threatened species of bird in the family Phaenicophilidae, the Hispaniolan palm-tanagers

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the Dominican Republic, it is rarely found in the north and south slopes of the Sierra de Baoruco, as well as on the southern part of Loma de Toro and Hoyo de Pelempito

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species inhabits every available forest type from dry to wet and open to dense

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species inhabits every available forest type from dry to wet and open to dense

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, the palm-tanager is common in areas of remaining habitat. "The small amount of forest left on Hispaniola is under constant pressure [but the species'] generalist habits likely buffer it to some extent from the effects of deforestation"
